name: Reduced-Fat Macaroni & Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare macaroni as label directs, but do not add salt to water; drain.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. Spray a shallow, broiler-safe, 2 1/2-quart casserole dish with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Blend cottage cheese in a food processor until smooth (or blend with 1/4 cup milk in blender for easier blending).
5. Mix flour with 1/4 cup milk in a saucepan until smooth.
6. Slowly stir in the remaining milk, then cook over medium heat until the mixture just boils and thickens slightly, stirring frequently.
7. Remove from heat; stir in cottage cheese, cheddar, salt, pepper, nutmeg, and Parmesan.
8. Place macaroni in casserole dish; cover with cheese sauce.
9. Bake, uncovered, for 20 minutes.
10. Turn oven control to broil. Sprinkle Parmesan on top of the macaroni mixture.
11. Place casserole under the broiler at the closest position to the heat source and broil for 2 to 3 minutes until the top is golden brown.
